entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched around August 2017. Crex24 is now marked by multiple exchange trackers as no longer operational, inactive, or without live market data, but HEI does not assign a terminal date because no sufficiently strong official shutdown notice has been established.
entity.notes: The existing launch and no-active-market events are not duplicated. Current Crex24-branded domains using different domains or recovery language are not treated as proof that the original crex24.com exchange resumed. Keep inactive rather than forcing dead status or a shutdown date.

expected.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched around 2017. Current market-data trackers show Crex24 with no active markets, no tracked volume, or as no longer operational. HEI models it as inactive because available evidence supports lack of active exchange operation but does not establish a definitive shutdown announcement or terminal date.
expected.notes: HEI keeps Crex24 inactive rather than dead because public trackers indicate no operational market data / no longer operational status, while stronger official terminal shutdown evidence is not attached. Do not assign death_reason or death_date without stronger closure evidence.

evidence.title: CREX24 Exchange
evidence.notes: Current tracker page warns that the exchange is no longer operational.

evidence.title: Crex24 exchange overview
evidence.notes: Tracker update states that market data was no longer being received from the exchange, supporting inactive treatment without proving a terminal shutdown date.
